days.task: Strip ALL affiliate params (aid=304142, aid=2276674, label=msn-*, sid=, srpvid=) from every file in public/data/**/*.json and replace with clean Booking.com property URLs
days.notes: Revenue leak — every booking pays a stranger

days.task: Fix wrong property links in lasvegas/hotels.json: Cosmopolitan must link to Cosmopolitan; Excalibur must link to Excalibur
days.notes: Wrong hotels showing to users

days.task: Add rel="sponsored nofollow" on ALL affiliate <a> tags in propertylisting.tsx and hotel/flight components
days.notes: Google policy since 2019; missing = site quality flag

days.task: Add metadataBase: new URL('https://www.travelamerica.work') to app/layout.tsx; fix OG image path in nyc-safety-guide/page.tsx (remove Windows backslashes and bare filename, add leading /)
days.notes: OG/Twitter cards never load without this

days.task: Convert public/sitemap.xml to app/sitemap.ts (dynamic, with lastModified for each page)
days.notes: Google weights lastmod heavily now

days.task: Add app/robots.ts: disallow /api/, declare canonical sitemap URL, set GPTBot and Google-Extended rules
days.notes: Currently only 2 lines in robots.txt

days.task: Fix next.config.ts (remove dual CommonJS + ESM exports); move app/.env.local to project root and add to .gitignore; delete page copy.tsx
days.notes: Headers may not apply; page copy.tsx gets routed by Next.js

days.task: Replace all 'yourdomain.com' and 'travelamerica.com' (wrong TLD) placeholders in all JSON-LD schema blocks; standardize brand name to 'Travel America' everywhere
days.notes: Google sees garbage structured data currently

days.task: Remove <Head> from header.tsx (App Router ignores it); use Next.js Image with priority for preloading; submit fresh sitemap in GSC after Day 5 change goes live
days.notes: Preload tags do nothing in App Router

days.task: Sign up for Stay22 affiliate at stay22.com/affiliates — paste their JS snippet into the layout so hotel maps/widgets appear on NYC pages automatically
days.notes: Paste snippet = immediate hotel monetization on all pages

days.task: Apply for GetYourGuide affiliate at partners.getyourguide.com; once approved add NYC tours widget to solo-trip and safety pages
days.notes: NYC tours = perfect fit for solo-travel audience

days.task: Apply for Travelpayouts at travelpayouts.com; integrate flight search widget on relevant pages
days.notes: Covers flights + hotels via Booking.com through TP network

days.task: Apply for Trip.com affiliate at trip.com/affiliate; apply for Awin network at awin.com/signup
days.notes: Awin = alternate Booking.com approval path

days.task: Apply for Amazon Associates at affiliate-program.amazon.com; create an affiliate earnings tracking spreadsheet to monitor all programs
days.notes: For packing lists and travel gear posts

days.task: Rewrite title and meta description for /destination/nyc/solo-trip-to-nyc. New title: 'Solo Trip to NYC in 2026: 7-Day Plan, Safe Areas & Real Costs'. Meta: promise + credibility + CTA
days.notes: 89 impressions, 0 clicks — free traffic waiting

days.task: Rewrite title and meta description for /majorcities/newyork/solo-travel targeting 'travel to nyc alone' query. Add 2026, a specific number, and a curiosity gap
days.notes: 162 impressions, 0 clicks — biggest missed opportunity

days.task: Rewrite title and meta for /nyc-safety-guide: 'Is NYC Safe at Night in 2026? A Local's Honest Answer (with Maps)'. Update page content with 2026 data
days.notes: 101 impressions, 0 clicks

days.task: Rewrite title and meta for nyc-safety-solo-travelers. Map all 4 near-duplicate NYC safety pages and decide which URL will be the master consolidation target
days.notes: Plan the consolidation before executing

days.task: Request indexing in GSC for all 4 rewritten pages. Find the 3x404 pages in GSC Coverage report, identify what links to them, fix or remove broken internal links
days.notes: Do immediately after rewrites go live

days.task: Run PageSpeed Insights on top 5 pages. Document LCP and CLS issues — likely unoptimized hero images. Create a fix list for Day 28
days.notes: No field data yet — need lab scores to start

days.task: GSC week-over-week review: compare impressions and clicks vs Day 1. Did any rewritten page improve? Adjust titles that did not move
days.notes: Early signal on title effectiveness

days.task: Write and publish 'Best Time to Visit NYC for Solo Travelers 2026' (1,500+ words). Include month-by-month breakdown, crowds, weather, events
days.notes: Targets query cluster with existing GSC impressions

days.task: Write and publish 'NYC Subway Guide for Tourists 2026: Lines, Safety & Etiquette' (1,500+ words)
days.notes: 'nyc subway etiquette' query showing GSC interest

days.task: Set up email capture: create ConvertKit or Buttondown free-tier account; design opt-in form for the site
days.notes: Audience proof = critical for Booking.com application

days.task: Create 'NYC Solo Safety Cheat Sheet' PDF lead magnet (1 page, printable, branded). Offer in exchange for email sign-up
days.notes: High relevance to top queries; incentive to subscribe

days.task: Embed email capture form on top 5 pages: solo-trip, safety guide, subway guide, nyc-safety-solo-travelers, homepage
days.notes: Activate lead magnet where traffic is highest

days.task: Check Stay22 and GetYourGuide affiliate dashboards: are they tracking clicks correctly? Any early conversions? Adjust widget placement if CTR is zero
days.notes: First 2-week earnings checkpoint

days.task: Fix LCP issues from Day 20 audit: convert large hero images to Next.js Image component with proper sizes and priority props
days.notes: Common issue on image-heavy NYC pages

days.task: Write and publish 'Is It Safe to Walk in NYC at Night? Neighborhood-by-Neighborhood Guide' (1,500+ words)
days.notes: Targets safety + location intent in one post

days.task: Month 1 Review: compare GSC clicks vs Day 1, count affiliate programs active, count indexed pages, check for schema errors in GSC Enhancements report. Write a brief progress summary
days.notes: Checkpoint before Month 2 investment increases

days.task: Execute NYC safety page consolidation: merge nyc-safety-solo-travelers + 3 near-duplicate pages into one 2,500+ word master page at the strongest URL
days.notes: Ends the 'crawled, not indexed' problem

days.task: Implement 301 redirects in Next.js/Vercel config for all merged safety pages pointing to master URL
days.notes: No orphan URLs — redirect everything cleanly

days.task: Submit consolidated master safety page for indexing in GSC. Monitor Coverage report for 48 hours to confirm it is indexed
days.notes: Google needs to see the merge happened

days.task: Write 'NYC Solo Female Nightlife Guide 2026: Safe Areas, Best Venues & What to Avoid' (1,500+ words)
days.notes: High intent query cluster; good GetYourGuide tours fit

days.task: Write 'Best NYC Neighborhoods for Solo Travelers: Safety, Vibe & Price' (1,500+ words). Include hotel affiliate links via Stay22
days.notes: Strong hotel affiliate placement opportunity

days.task: Fix remaining CLS issues from Day 20 audit. Add missing alt text to all images. Verify lazy loading on non-hero images
days.notes: Core Web Vitals foundations

days.task: Verify 301 redirects are indexed correctly. Confirm master safety page is indexed and not showing as 'crawled, not indexed'
days.notes: Confirm consolidation worked as expected

days.task: Sign up for HARO / Connectively. Send first 3 pitches as NYC solo-travel expert in response to relevant journalist queries
days.notes: Each HARO placement = DR 40-80 backlink

days.task: Research 5 smaller travel blogs (DA 15-30) for guest post opportunities. Draft a personalized outreach email template
days.notes: Quality beats quantity for early backlinks

days.task: Send 3 guest post pitches with tailored topic ideas for each blog's audience
days.notes: Target: at least 1 acceptance this week

days.task: Write 'NYC Budget Travel Guide 2026: How Much Does a Solo Trip Really Cost?' (2,000+ words)
days.notes: High commercial intent; strong hotel and flight affiliate fit

days.task: Write 'Best Day Trips from NYC for Solo Travelers 2026' (1,500+ words). Include GetYourGuide tour links
days.notes: Expands beyond city; tours fit perfectly

days.task: Send 3 more HARO pitches. Follow up on Day 40 guest post pitches (7 days is appropriate follow-up window)
days.notes: Persistence is key with outreach

days.task: Write 'NYC Airport Guide 2026: JFK, LaGuardia & Newark for First-Timers' (1,200+ words). Include Travelpayouts links
days.notes: Strong affiliate placement for Travelpayouts flights

days.task: Write 'Best Apps for Solo Travel in NYC 2026'. Integrate Amazon Associates links for travel gear and accessories
days.notes: Amazon converts well for product recommendation posts

days.task: Write 'NYC Tipping Guide 2026: Restaurants, Taxis, Hotels — How Much?' (1,200+ words)
days.notes: High search volume practical query with low competition

days.task: Create About page: write real bio with author photo placeholder, contact form, social media links, and any publication credentials
days.notes: Required for Booking.com credibility review

days.task: Republish your best performing article on Medium with a canonical tag pointing back to travelamerica.work
days.notes: Syndication = free exposure; canonical protects SEO

days.task: Send 3 more guest post pitches. Reply to any acceptance emails with draft outlines
days.notes: Keep pipeline active every week

days.task: Research domain availability: travelamerica.com, travelamerica.co, travelamericas.com. Compare prices and make purchase decision
days.notes: .work TLD = biggest single Booking.com red flag

days.task: GSC position check: has /destination/nyc/solo-trip-to-nyc moved from position 20 toward top 10? Document positions of all rewritten pages
days.notes: Expect movement by Week 7 from Month 1 rewrites

days.task: Write '3-Day NYC Itinerary for Solo Female Travelers 2026' (2,000+ words) — comprehensive hub page
days.notes: Longer form = stronger ranking signal

days.task: Write 'Is Central Park Safe at Night? What Solo Travelers Need to Know' (1,200+ words)
days.notes: Specific query; easy GetYourGuide tour placement

days.task: Purchase chosen domain (travelamerica.com or best available). Set up hosting with identical URL structure as travelamerica.work
days.notes: Begin migration — takes 2 weeks to stabilize in GSC

days.task: Write 'NYC Solo Travel Packing List 2026' with Amazon Associates product recommendations for each item
days.notes: Product posts earn passively with low maintenance

days.task: Add affiliate disclosure statement to every page that contains affiliate links (FTC and Booking.com policy requirement)
days.notes: Missing disclosure = automatic Booking.com rejection

days.task: Add GetYourGuide and Stay22 widgets to all new Month 2 content pages published so far
days.notes: Monetize new content immediately on publish

days.task: Follow up on all pending guest post pitches. Check GSC Links report for new referring domains acquired
days.notes: Target: 2-3 backlinks secured by Day 58

days.task: Post Reddit AMA in r/solotravel: answer NYC safety questions thoroughly. Add site URL to Reddit bio and pinned comment
days.notes: Community trust + organic traffic + potential backlink

days.task: Month 2 Review: are you hitting 200+ clicks/month? Count email subscribers. Count backlinks. Check affiliate earnings. Count indexed pages (target 40+). Write progress report
days.notes: Go/no-go assessment for Month 3 Booking.com application

days.task: Set up new domain (e.g. travelamerica.com) with identical content, URL structure, and Next.js config as travelamerica.work
days.notes: Migration must be seamless — same URLs, same content

days.task: Implement 301 redirects from .work to .com for EVERY URL including blog posts, not just the homepage
days.notes: Missing even one URL = duplicate content risk

days.task: Add new domain as GSC property. Update sitemap to new domain. Submit. Update all JSON-LD schema to new domain
days.notes: GSC must recognize the new domain from Day 1

days.task: Update all internal links, canonical tags, and meta across every page to reference new domain only
days.notes: Canonical confusion = ranking loss during migration

days.task: Monitor GSC daily: new domain indexing progress, crawl errors, 404s. Fix any issues within 24 hours
days.notes: First 2 weeks post-migration are the most critical

days.task: Write 'NYC Travel Insurance Guide 2026: Do You Really Need It?' (1,200+ words). Add Travelpayouts or World Nomads affiliate link
days.notes: Insurance affiliate = high commission per conversion

days.task: Write 'NYC for Solo Travelers from the UK, Canada & India: Entry, Currency & Tips' (1,500+ words)
days.notes: International audience significantly expands reach

days.task: Update all existing articles with 2026 data, current hotel prices, updated safety statistics. Add 'Updated: June 2026' to meta descriptions
days.notes: Fresh dates improve CTR and send freshness signals to Google

days.task: Build internal link hub: every NYC article should link to the master safety page and the solo-trip-to-nyc page. Create a hub-and-spoke link structure
days.notes: Hub-and-spoke = stronger topical authority signal for NYC

days.task: Write 'NYC Food Guide for Solo Travelers 2026: Eating Alone Without Awkwardness' (1,500+ words)
days.notes: Lifestyle angle; high share potential on social

days.task: Write 'NYC Solo Travel Safety Stats 2026: What the Data Actually Shows' (1,500+ words). Cite NYPD crime data and BLS statistics
days.notes: Data-driven posts attract backlinks naturally

days.task: Indexing audit: verify you have 50+ indexed pages in GSC. Request indexing for any pages not yet indexed. Check Coverage for errors
days.notes: 50+ indexed pages = Booking.com reviewer confidence

days.task: Full affiliate audit: confirm all URLs have no stale aid= params, all have rel='sponsored nofollow', all pages with links have visible disclosure
days.notes: Pre-application compliance check

days.task: Full site audit via GSC Coverage report: fix any new crawl errors, redirect loops, or missing meta introduced by domain migration
days.notes: Clean site = strong application

days.task: Write Booking.com application pitch: describe NYC solo-travel niche, audience profile, content quality, email list size, and existing affiliate relationships
days.notes: Craft like a cover letter — specifics beat generics

days.task: Gather application evidence: take GSC screenshots of clicks and indexed pages. Screenshot affiliate dashboards. Note email subscriber count
days.notes: Have numbers ready when filling out application

days.task: APPLY to Booking.com Affiliate Program at partners.booking.com. Use new .com domain if migration is stable. This is the primary goal of the entire 90 days
days.notes: *** THE BIG DAY — submit the application ***

days.task: Apply via Awin network simultaneously at awin.com. Separate review team, sometimes easier to get approved for Booking.com via this route
days.notes: Two parallel paths are better than one

days.task: Write 'NYC vs Chicago for Solo Travelers: Which City Is Better?' (1,500+ words). Start expanding topical coverage beyond NYC
days.notes: Broadens site scope; preps for Las Vegas content cluster

days.task: Write 'Las Vegas for Solo Travelers 2026: Safety, Hotels & Budget Tips' (1,500+ words). Use existing lasvegas JSON data
days.notes: You already have Las Vegas data — start ranking for it

days.task: Check Booking.com application status in partners.booking.com. Respond to any questions from their affiliate team within 24 hours
days.notes: Responsiveness signals professionalism to reviewers

days.task: Optimize affiliate widget placement based on 2-month click and earnings data. Move best performing widgets above the fold
days.notes: Data-driven optimization compounds earnings

days.task: Write 'Solo Travel Safety Tips: 25 Rules Every Solo Traveler Must Know' (2,000+ words). Make it a comprehensive evergreen hub page
days.notes: Evergreen hubs earn backlinks passively over time

days.task: Follow up with Booking.com if no response received. Email partners@booking.com referencing your application date and site URL
days.notes: 7-day follow-up is standard and expected behavior

days.task: Send first email newsletter to your list: NYC travel tips, curated affiliate links, and a personal note from the author
days.notes: Activate subscribers; shows Booking.com you have an engaged audience

days.task: Expand and re-optimize top 5 performing pages: add FAQ sections, strengthen internal links, update CTAs to match new affiliate partners
days.notes: Compound the content that is already ranking

days.task: Plan Las Vegas content cluster: identify top 10 queries using GSC plus keyword research. Outline 10 articles to publish in Month 4
days.notes: Las Vegas data already in your JSON — use it now

days.task: Write 'NYC Solo Travel Itinerary: 5 Days on a Budget Under $1,000' (2,000+ words) — comprehensive hub page
days.notes: Fills the 5-day itinerary gap in current content

days.task: Respond to any Booking.com queries. Prepare supplementary documents they request: site screenshots, content portfolio PDF, traffic screenshots
days.notes: Be the easiest applicant they process

days.task: 90-Day Retrospective: compile metrics report (organic clicks vs Day 1, indexed pages, backlinks, email subscribers, affiliate earnings). Plan Month 4 sprint based on what worked
days.notes: Document progress and momentum; plan next 30 days before it fades
